stages.name: targeted_unit_tests
stages.evidence: fail_fast_impact_test (baseline fail-fast truncation, deterministic impact_graph selection, conservative fallback, documented mutant skip reasons, end-to-end impact_graph report) and config_test (impact_graph accepted; unknown strategy still rejected) pass; full suite green

stages.name: property_tests
stages.evidence: impact analysis selects same-file tests in deterministic (file, line, name) order; impact_graph narrows when the impact set is covered and conservatively falls back to the full suite when uncertain

stages.name: mutation_checks
stages.reason: full self-mutation dogfood of zentinel's own runner/selection is gated to the Phase 5 stages (task 085); fail-fast and impact analysis are deterministic and covered by unit and property-style tests

stages.name: final_artifact_audit
stages.evidence: task-control Markdown and JSON agree; fail-fast never hides survivors (baseline failure yields zero mutants and exit 3; mutant fail-fast records documented skip reasons); completion evidence lists concrete changed files
